channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. ‘Tyrant’ Trump is ‘Joe Bidening’ his presidency with ominous threat to gas stations, critics say  AL.com
  2. Energy experts said gas prices would stay high. Why were they wrong?  Politico
  3. US treasury secretary warns oil and gas companies to lower prices: ‘We’re watching’  The Guardian
  4. Trump urges gasoline retailers to lower prices, warns of 'big problems' if they don't  Reuters
  5. Trump takes his inflation battle to gas retailers after his plot against the Fed runs aground—sets target for $2.50 a gallon  Fortune

item.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq register best quarter since 2020 despite Iran war - Reuters
item.description:
1. S&P 500, Nasdaq register best quarter since 2020 despite Iran war  Reuters
  2. Stocks close out Q2, Nike earnings, egg prices and more in Morning Squawk  CNBC
  3. Stock Market News, June 30, 2026: Nasdaq Advances, Climbs 21% for Quarter  WSJ
  4. The S&P 500 is up almost 10% this year, despite war, inflation and AI nerves  CNN
  5. Stock market today: Dow hits record, S&P 500 jumps to cap best quarter since 2020 amid massive chip rally  Yahoo Finance
